description: Join Binance and Crypto Collective for an online masterclass focused on crypto trading strategies and insights. Dario Angelo, co-founder of Crypto Collective, shares his journey and expertise in trading, emphasizing the importance of risk management and psychological factors in trading success.
topic_summary: In this masterclass, Dario Angelo discusses the psychology of institutional orders and introduces five lesser-known chart patterns for trading. He highlights the significance of risk management and provides educational insights for attendees interested in cryptocurrency trading. [t=482.81]
